title: lantana × paraensis
intro: Lantana × paraensis, also known as the Panama lantana, is a hybrid plant species in the Lantana genus, a group of flowering shrubs native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Lantana × paraensis, including infusions and tinctures, are used to harness its medicinal properties.
